task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the observation plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal displaying the contents of 'quasar_survey_plan.txt' from the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captured Luminance (L) and Red (R) exposures for target 3C 273.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos interface showing 3C 273 as the active target with exposure sequences running, OR a file manager/terminal showing newly created FITS files in L and R directories for 3C 273.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captured Luminance (L) and Red (R) exposures for target TON 618.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos interface showing TON 618 as the active target with exposure sequences running, OR a file manager/terminal showing newly created FITS files in L and R directories for TON 618.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captured Luminance (L) and Red (R) exposures for target PG 1634+706.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos interface showing PG 1634+706 as the active target with exposure sequences running, OR a file manager/terminal showing newly created FITS files in L and R directories for PG 1634+706.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent fetched 'cool' palette DSS2 reference images for the targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to an astronomical image service (like CDS hips2fits) with the 'cool' color palette selected, OR an image viewer/file manager showing the downloaded DSS2 reference images.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created and saved a session summary log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the summary log being written, OR a file manager showing 'summary_log.txt' (or 'quasar_survey_log.txt') in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture the exposures.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars/Ekos GUI being actively used to set up the camera, filters, and targets. The agent should not be bypassing the software by just using terminal commands (e.g., 'touch') to create empty files with the expected names.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually downloaded real DSS2 images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a browser interacting with a real astronomical image service or actual image files being viewed, rather than creating fake/empty image files.

integrity.description: Verify the summary log contains actual observational data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The log file contents should reflect the captured exposures, targets, and filters, rather than just a direct copy-paste of the task description prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Targets: 3C273 (RA 12.485, Dec 2.052), TON618 (RA 12.474, Dec 35.967), PG1634 (RA 16.575, Dec 70.526). Required filters: Luminance (L) and Red (R). Minimum exposures per filter: 3. The log file should be saved in ~/Documents (named summary_log.txt or quasar_survey_log.txt). DSS2 reference images should use the 'cool' palette. The environment uses KStars/INDI CCD simulator for captures and CDS hips2fits for DSS2.
